ManagedAttribute.displayName: Read-write all virtual appointments for users, as authorized by online meetings app access policy [on] Microsoft Graph

entry.value: Allows the application to read and write virtual appointments for all users, without a signed-in user. The app must also be authorized to access an individual user’s data by the online meetings application access policy.
Read-write all virtual appointments for users, as authorized by online meetings app access policy [on] Microsoft Graph
